timing: Hook stage: engagement CTA (poll/comment) to capture reaction
Mid-content (data reveal): newsletter CTA to capture trust-building moment
Closing/reframe: community CTA to sustain relationship post-content
Following flagship report launch: premium CTA for monetization push
recommendations: Reconcile GTM persona/channel mismatch before scaling paid promotion of premium CTAs
Sequence CTAs to prioritize trust (newsletter/community) over monetization (premium) in Months 1-6
A/B test primary CTA placement immediately after data/proof points, not at content open
Use engagement CTAs early to boost algorithmic reach before pushing conversion CTAs
Reserve premium CTAs for post-flagship-report audience segments only
summary: This CTA strategy sequences trust-building (engagement, newsletter, community) ahead of monetization (premium, enterprise), mirroring the phased 12-month plan. Primary CTAs center on flagship report and subscription growth, reinforcing editorial authority before introducing premium/enterprise offers. Timing aligns with the story architecture's pacing—capturing anxiety-driven engagement early, converting at the credibility peak, and sustaining community relationships through to monetization.
